args.text: CVE-2026-30117 severity assessment: High-severity session-fixation vulnerability in auth-api and session-store. Requires immediate patching and credential rotation. All staff sessions must be re-established post-patch.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
The patch window for CVE-2026-30117 has been confirmed. The following services will be patched:

- auth-api → v5.8.4
- session-store → v2.2.9

Deployment will commence immediately. All staff sessions will require re-establishment following the patching.

args.text: CVE-2026-30117 patching complete. Verified deployments: auth-api running v5.8.4, session-store running v2.2.9. Both services successfully patched and confirmed operational.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching has been completed successfully.

Verified deployments:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

All services are operational and running the patched versions. Credential rotation is proceeding as scheduled.

args.text: Credential rotation completed for CVE-2026-30117 remediation. (1) All active refresh tokens invalidated, (2) signing keys rotated, (3) old keys confirmed rejected. All staff must sign in again to establish new sessions.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
As part of CVE-2026-30117 remediation, all active sessions have been invalidated and credentials have been rotated.

Please sign in again to establish a new session. This is a required security maintenance step.

Thank you for your cooperation.
